def norm_col(x: str) -> str:
    return (
        str(x).strip().lower()
        .replace(" ", "_")
        .replace("-", "_")
        .replace(".", "_")
        .replace("/", "_")
    )

def detect_col(df: pd.DataFrame, candidates: List[str], required: bool = True) -> Optional[str]:
    lookup = {norm_col(c): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if norm_col(cand) in lookup:
            return lookup[norm_col(cand)]
    if required:
        raise KeyError(f"Missing columns. tried={candidates}, got={list(df.columns)}")
    return None

def read_tsv(path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:
    return pd.read_csv(path, sep="\t", dtype=str, keep_default_na=False)

def write_tsv(df: pd.DataFrame, path: Path) -> None:
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    df.to_csv(path, sep="\t", index=False)

def ensure_dir(path: Path) -> None:
    path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

def uniq_join(values: Iterable[str], sep: str = ";") -> str:
    seen = []
    for v in values:
        v = str(v).strip()
        if v and v not in seen:
            seen.append(v)
    return sep.join(seen)

def truthy(x: str) -> bool:
    return str(x).strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "t", "yes", "y"}

def load_fasta(path: Path) -> Dict[str, str]:
    out: Dict[str, str] = {}
    name = None
    seq = []
    with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        for line in f:
            line = line.strip()
            if not line:
                continue
            if line.startswith(">"):
                if name is not None:
                    out[name] = "".join(seq)
                name = line[1:].split()[0]
                seq = []
            else:
                seq.append(line)
        if name is not None:
            out[name] = "".join(seq)
    return out

def write_fasta(records: Iterable[Tuple[str, str]], path: Path) -> None:
    with open(path, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        for rid, seq in records:
            f.write(f">{rid}\n")
            for i in range(0, len(seq), 80):
                f.write(seq[i:i+80] + "\n")

# =========================
# unresolved 主/备路径
# =========================

def unresolved_cases_is_feature_level(df: pd.DataFrame) -> bool:
    cols = {norm_col(c) for c in df.columns}
    return any(x in cols for x in {"feature_id", "asv_id", "id"})

def derive_unresolved_feature_cases(annotation_confidence: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = annotation_confidence.copy()

    feature_col = detect_col(df, ["feature_id", "asv_id", "id"])
    marker_col = detect_col(df, ["marker"], required=False)
    rank_col = detect_col(df, ["taxon_rank", "rank"], required=False)
    name_col = detect_col(df, ["taxon_name", "taxonomy", "name"], required=False)
    conf_col = detect_col(df, ["confidence", "score"], required=False)

    unresolved_mask = pd.Series(False, index=df.index)

    for cname in ["unresolved_flag", "any_unresolved_flag", "is_unresolved", "low_confidence_flag"]:
        col = detect_col(df, [cname], required=False)
        if col:
            unresolved_mask = unresolved_mask | df[col].map(truthy)

    for cname in ["status", "annotation_status", "assign_status"]:
        col = detect_col(df, [cname], required=False)
        if col:
            unresolved_mask = unresolved_mask | df[col].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower().isin(
                {"unresolved", "unassigned", "ambiguous", "unknown"}
            )

    if name_col:
        unresolved_mask = unresolved_mask | df[name_col].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower().isin(
            {"", "unresolved", "unassigned", "ambiguous", "unknown"}
        )

    out = pd.DataFrame({
        "feature_id": df[feature_col],
        "marker": df[marker_col] if marker_col else "",
        "taxon_rank": df[rank_col] if rank_col else "",
        "taxon_name": df[name_col] if name_col else "",
        "confidence": df[conf_col] if conf_col else "",
        "unresolved_source": "derived_from_annotation_confidence",
    })

    for optional_col in [
        "raw_taxonomy_text", "stitle", "reference_name",
        "annotation_scope_flag", "status_reason", "low_confidence_reason",
        "kingdom", "domain"
    ]:
        col = detect_col(df, [optional_col], required=False)
        out[optional_col] = df[col] if col else ""

    out = out[unresolved_mask].drop_duplicates()
    if out.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[
            "feature_id", "marker", "taxon_rank", "taxon_name", "confidence",
            "unresolved_source", "raw_taxonomy_text", "stitle", "reference_name",
            "annotation_scope_flag", "status_reason", "low_confidence_reason",
            "kingdom", "domain"
        ])
    return out

# =========================
# ASV 表 -> occurrence
# =========================

def asv_to_long(df: pd.DataFrame, forced_marker: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    cols_norm = {norm_col(c): c for c in df.columns}

    # long table
    if {"sample_id", "feature_id", "reads"}.issubset(cols_norm.keys()):
        out = df[[cols_norm["sample_id"], cols_norm["feature_id"], cols_norm["reads"]]].copy()
        out.columns = ["sample_id", "feature_id", "reads"]
        out["marker"] = forced_marker
        return out

    # wide table
    feature_col = detect_col(df, ["feature_id", "asv_id", "id"])
    replicate_col = detect_col(df, ["replicate"], required=False)
    reserved = {feature_col}
    if replicate_col:
        reserved.add(replicate_col)

    rows = []
    feature_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c not in reserved]
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        for sample_col in feature_cols:
            try:
                reads = int(float(row[sample_col]))
            except Exception:
                reads = 0
            if reads > 0:
                rows.append({
                    "sample_id": str(sample_col).strip(),
                    "feature_id": str(row[feature_col]).strip(),
                    "reads": reads,
                    "marker": forced_marker,
                })

    if not rows:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["sample_id", "feature_id", "reads", "marker"])
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

def build_unresolved_feature_occurrence(
    unresolved_feature_cases: pd.DataFrame,
    its1_asv: pd.DataFrame,
    its2_asv: pd.DataFrame,
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if unresolved_feature_cases.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=[
            "sample_id", "feature_id", "marker", "reads",
            "taxon_rank", "taxon_name", "confidence", "unresolved_source"
        ])

    long_all = pd.concat(
        [asv_to_long(its1_asv, "ITS1"), asv_to_long(its2_asv, "ITS2")],
        ignore_index=True
    )

    work = unresolved_feature_cases.drop_duplicates(subset=["feature_id"]).copy()
    merged = long_all.merge(work, on=["feature_id", "marker"], how="inner")
    merged["reads"] = pd.to_numeric(merged["reads"], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)
    merged = merged[merged["reads"] > 0].copy()

    cols = [c for c in [
        "sample_id", "feature_id", "marker", "reads",
        "taxon_rank", "taxon_name", "confidence", "unresolved_source",
        "raw_taxonomy_text", "stitle", "reference_name",
        "annotation_scope_flag", "status_reason", "low_confidence_reason",
        "kingdom", "domain"
    ] if c in merged.columns]
    return merged[cols].drop_duplicates()

def build_unresolved_candidate_assets(
    occurrence: pd.DataFrame,
    unresolved_feature_cases: pd.DataFrame,
    its1_fasta: Dict[str, str],
    its2_fasta: Dict[str, str],
) -> Tuple[pd.DataFrame, List[Tuple[str, str]]]:
    feat_set = set(occurrence["feature_id"].astype(str).tolist()) if not occurrence.empty else set()
    rows = []
    fasta_rows = []

    for _, row in unresolved_feature_cases.drop_duplicates(subset=["feature_id"]).iterrows():
        fid = str(row["feature_id"])
        if fid not in feat_set:
            continue

        seq = its1_fasta.get(fid) or its2_fasta.get(fid) or ""
        rows.append({
            "candidate_id": fid,
            "feature_id": fid,
            "marker": row.get("marker", ""),
            "sequence_length": len(seq),
            "taxon_rank": row.get("taxon_rank", ""),
            "taxon_name": row.get("taxon_name", ""),
            "confidence": row.get("confidence", ""),
            "raw_taxonomy_text": row.get("raw_taxonomy_text", ""),
            "stitle": row.get("stitle", ""),
            "reference_name": row.get("reference_name", ""),
            "annotation_scope_flag": row.get("annotation_scope_flag", ""),
            "status_reason": row.get("status_reason", ""),
            "low_confidence_reason": row.get("low_confidence_reason", ""),
            "kingdom": row.get("kingdom", ""),
            "domain": row.get("domain", ""),
        })
        if seq:
            fasta_rows.append((fid, seq))

    meta = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    if meta.empty:
        meta = pd.DataFrame(columns=[
            "candidate_id", "feature_id", "marker", "sequence_length",
            "taxon_rank", "taxon_name", "confidence",
            "raw_taxonomy_text", "stitle", "reference_name",
            "annotation_scope_flag", "status_reason", "low_confidence_reason",
            "kingdom", "domain",
        ])
    return meta, fasta_rows

# =========================
# prescreen：显式 kingdom/domain 优先；缺失时退回文本 hint
# =========================

def classify_prescreen(row: pd.Series) -> str:
    domain = str(row.get("domain", "")).strip().lower()
    kingdom = str(row.get("kingdom", "")).strip().lower()

    explicit = f"{domain} {kingdom}".strip()
    if explicit:
        if "fungi" in explicit:
            return "fungal_supported"
        if any(x in explicit for x in PLANT_HINTS):
            return "plant_like"
        if any(x in explicit for x in OTHER_HINTS):
            return "other"

    text = " ".join([
        str(row.get("taxon_name", "")),
        str(row.get("raw_taxonomy_text", "")),
        str(row.get("stitle", "")),
        str(row.get("reference_name", "")),
        str(row.get("annotation_scope_flag", "")),
    ]).strip().lower()

    if not text:
        return "insufficient_signal"
    if any(x in text for x in FUNGAL_HINTS):
        return "fungal_supported"
    if any(x in text for x in PLANT_HINTS):
        return "plant_like"
    if any(x in text for x in OTHER_HINTS):
        return "other"
    return "insufficient_signal"

def build_prescreen_hits(candidate_meta: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if candidate_meta.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["candidate_id", "feature_id", "marker", "prescreen_class", "prescreen_note"])

    work = candidate_meta.copy()
    work["prescreen_class"] = work.apply(classify_prescreen, axis=1)
    work["prescreen_note"] = work["prescreen_class"].map({
        "fungal_supported": "eligible_for_fungal_placement",
        "plant_like": "observation_only_non_fungal_supported",
        "other": "observation_only_non_fungal_supported",
        "insufficient_signal": "observation_only_insufficient_signal",
    })
    return work[["candidate_id", "feature_id", "marker", "prescreen_class", "prescreen_note"]].drop_duplicates()

# =========================
# placement：读预计算结果；非 fungal_supported 强制 observation
# =========================

def load_precomputed_placement(path: Optional[Path], candidate_meta: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    base = pd.DataFrame({"candidate_id": candidate_meta["candidate_id"].astype(str).unique()}) if not candidate_meta.empty \
        else pd.DataFrame(columns=["candidate_id"])

    if path is None or not path.exists():
        base["placement_status"] = "observation_only"
        base["nearest_ref"] = ""
        base["nearest_ref_identity"] = ""
        base["placement_tool"] = ""
        base["placement_note"] = "no_precomputed_placement"
        return base

    df = read_tsv(path)
    cid = detect_col(df, ["candidate_id"])
    ps = detect_col(df, ["placement_status"])
    nr = detect_col(df, ["nearest_ref"], required=False)
    ni = detect_col(df, ["nearest_ref_identity"], required=False)
    pt = detect_col(df, ["placement_tool"], required=False)
    pn = detect_col(df, ["placement_note"], required=False)

    out = pd.DataFrame({
        "candidate_id": df[cid].astype(str),
        "placement_status": df[ps].astype(str),
        "nearest_ref": df[nr].astype(str) if nr else "",
        "nearest_ref_identity": df[ni].astype(str) if ni else "",
        "placement_tool": df[pt].astype(str) if pt else "",
        "placement_note": df[pn].astype(str) if pn else "loaded_from_precomputed_placement",
    })

    base = base.merge(out, on="candidate_id", how="left")
    for c, v in {
        "placement_status": "observation_only",
        "nearest_ref": "",
        "nearest_ref_identity": "",
        "placement_tool": "",
        "placement_note": "not_in_precomputed_placement",
    }.items():
        base[c] = base[c].fillna(v)
    return base

def gate_placement_by_prescreen(
    placement_summary: pd.DataFrame,
    prescreen_hits: pd.DataFrame,
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if placement_summary.empty:
        return placement_summary

    gate = prescreen_hits[["candidate_id", "prescreen_class"]].drop_duplicates() if not prescreen_hits.empty \
        else pd.DataFrame(columns=["candidate_id", "prescreen_class"])

    out = placement_summary.merge(gate, on="candidate_id", how="left")
    mask = out["prescreen_class"].fillna("insufficient_signal") != "fungal_supported"
    out.loc[mask, "placement_status"] = "observation_only"
    out.loc[mask, "nearest_ref"] = ""
    out.loc[mask, "nearest_ref_identity"] = ""
    out.loc[mask, "placement_tool"] = ""
    out.loc[mask, "placement_note"] = "forced_observation_by_prescreen_non_fungal_supported"
    return out.drop(columns=["prescreen_class"])

# =========================
# sensitivity / evidence
# =========================

def build_novelty_threshold_sensitivity(placement_summary: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    rows = []
    for _, row in placement_summary.iterrows():
        cid = row["candidate_id"]
        raw = str(row.get("nearest_ref_identity", "")).strip()
        try:
            ident = float(raw)
        except Exception:
            ident = None

        for t in SENSITIVITY_THRESHOLDS:
            if ident is None:
                call = "undetermined"
            elif ident < t:
                call = "candidate_novel"
            else:
                call = "not_novel"

            rows.append({
                "candidate_id": cid,
                "threshold_used": t,
                "nearest_ref_identity": raw,
                "novelty_call": call,
            })
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

def build_candidate_support_stats(occurrence: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if occurrence.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["candidate_id", "sample_support_n", "marker_support_class"])

    work = occurrence.copy()
    work["candidate_id"] = work["feature_id"]

    rows = []
    for cid, sub in work.groupby("candidate_id"):
        sample_n = sub["sample_id"].astype(str).nunique()
        marker_n = sub["marker"].astype(str).nunique()
        marker_support_class = "BOTH" if marker_n >= 2 else uniq_join(sorted(sub["marker"].astype(str).unique()), sep="|")
        rows.append({
            "candidate_id": cid,
            "sample_support_n": sample_n,
            "marker_support_class": marker_support_class,
        })
    return pd.DataFrame(rows)

def assign_level(
    prescreen_class: str,
    placement_status: str,
    nearest_ref_identity: str,
    novelty_call: str,
    sample_support_n: int,
    marker_support_class: str,
    threshold_used: float,
    min_samples_for_level_a: int = 2,
) -> Tuple[str, str]:
    """
    项目保守规则（不是文献原文规则）：
    - Level_C：非 fungal_supported，或没有有效 placement
    - Level_B：fungal_supported 且 placed，但证据未达到 A
    - Level_A：fungal_supported 且 placed，且在当前 threshold 下为 candidate_novel，
               且 sample_support_n >= min_samples_for_level_a 或 marker_support_class == BOTH
    """
    if prescreen_class != "fungal_supported":
        return "Level_C", "non_fungal_supported_or_insufficient_signal"

    if str(placement_status).strip().lower() != "placed":
        return "Level_C", "fungal_supported_but_no_valid_placement"

    if novelty_call == "candidate_novel" and (
        int(sample_support_n) >= int(min_samples_for_level_a) or marker_support_class == "BOTH"
    ):
        return "Level_A", "strongest_unresolved_evidence_not_taxonomic_claim"

    return "Level_B", "fungal_supported_with_valid_placement_but_limited_unresolved_support"

def build_candidate_evidence(
    prescreen_hits: pd.DataFrame,
    placement_summary: pd.DataFrame,
    sensitivity: pd.DataFrame,
    support_stats: pd.DataFrame,
    threshold_used: float,
    min_samples_for_level_a: int = 2,
) -> Tuple[pd.DataFrame, pd.DataFrame]:
    pres_map = prescreen_hits.set_index("candidate_id").to_dict(orient="index") if not prescreen_hits.empty else {}
    place_map = placement_summary.set_index("candidate_id").to_dict(orient="index") if not placement_summary.empty else {}
    sens_now = sensitivity[sensitivity["threshold_used"] == float(threshold_used)].copy()
    sens_map = sens_now.set_index("candidate_id").to_dict(orient="index") if not sens_now.empty else {}
    sup_map = support_stats.set_index("candidate_id").to_dict(orient="index") if not support_stats.empty else {}

    all_ids = sorted(set(list(pres_map.keys()) + list(place_map.keys()) + list(sup_map.keys())))
    clade_rows = []
    ev_rows = []

    for cid in all_ids:
        prescreen_class = pres_map.get(cid, {}).get("prescreen_class", "insufficient_signal")
        placement_status = place_map.get(cid, {}).get("placement_status", "observation_only")
        nearest_ref = place_map.get(cid, {}).get("nearest_ref", "")
        nearest_ref_identity = place_map.get(cid, {}).get("nearest_ref_identity", "")
        novelty_call = sens_map.get(cid, {}).get("novelty_call", "undetermined")
        sample_support_n = int(sup_map.get(cid, {}).get("sample_support_n", 0))
        marker_support_class = sup_map.get(cid, {}).get("marker_support_class", "")

        level, note = assign_level(
            prescreen_class=prescreen_class,
            placement_status=placement_status,
            nearest_ref_identity=nearest_ref_identity,
            novelty_call=novelty_call,
            sample_support_n=sample_support_n,
            marker_support_class=marker_support_class,
            threshold_used=threshold_used,
            min_samples_for_level_a=min_samples_for_level_a,
        )

        clade_rows.append({
            "candidate_id": cid,
            "candidate_novel_flag": str(novelty_call == "candidate_novel").lower(),
            "nearest_ref": nearest_ref,
            "threshold_used": threshold_used,
        })
        ev_rows.append({
            "candidate_id": cid,
            "phylo_unresolved_level": level,
            "evidence_note": note,
            "threshold_used": threshold_used,
        })

    return pd.DataFrame(clade_rows), pd.DataFrame(ev_rows)

# =========================
# sample-level addon
# =========================

def build_sample_type_call_phylo_addon(
    occurrence: pd.DataFrame,
    prescreen_hits: pd.DataFrame,
    placement_summary: pd.DataFrame,
    candidate_evidence: pd.DataFrame,
    sample_type_call: pd.DataFrame,
    threshold_used: float,
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    sid_col = detect_col(sample_type_call, ["sample_id"])
    all_samples = sample_type_call[[sid_col]].drop_duplicates().rename(columns={sid_col: "sample_id"})

    if occurrence.empty:
        out = all_samples.copy()
        out["phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag"] = "false"
        out["phylo_unresolved_candidate_ids"] = ""
        out["phylo_unresolved_level"] = ""
        out["phylo_unresolved_marker_support"] = ""
        out["phylo_unresolved_nearest_ref"] = ""
        out["phylo_unresolved_uncertainty_class"] = ""
        out["phylo_unresolved_note"] = "no_unresolved_candidate"
        out["threshold_used"] = str(threshold_used)
        out["annotation_only_flag"] = "true"
        return out

    work = occurrence.copy()
    work["candidate_id"] = work["feature_id"]

    pres_map = prescreen_hits.set_index("candidate_id").to_dict(orient="index") if not prescreen_hits.empty else {}
    place_map = placement_summary.set_index("candidate_id").to_dict(orient="index") if not placement_summary.empty else {}
    ev_map = candidate_evidence.set_index("candidate_id").to_dict(orient="index") if not candidate_evidence.empty else {}

    rows = []
    for sample_id, sub in work.groupby("sample_id"):
        cids = sorted(set(sub["candidate_id"].astype(str)))
        markers = sorted(set(sub["marker"].astype(str)))

        levels = [ev_map.get(cid, {}).get("phylo_unresolved_level", "") for cid in cids]
        nearest_refs = [place_map.get(cid, {}).get("nearest_ref", "") for cid in cids]
        uncertainty = [pres_map.get(cid, {}).get("prescreen_class", "") for cid in cids]
        notes = [ev_map.get(cid, {}).get("evidence_note", "") for cid in cids]

        anno_only = all(
            place_map.get(cid, {}).get("placement_status", "") != "placed"
            for cid in cids
        )

        rows.append({
            "sample_id": sample_id,
            "phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag": "true",
            "phylo_unresolved_candidate_ids": uniq_join(cids),
            "phylo_unresolved_level": uniq_join(levels),
            "phylo_unresolved_marker_support": "BOTH" if set(markers) == {"ITS1", "ITS2"} else uniq_join(markers, sep="|"),
            "phylo_unresolved_nearest_ref": uniq_join(nearest_refs),
            "phylo_unresolved_uncertainty_class": uniq_join(uncertainty),
            "phylo_unresolved_note": uniq_join(notes),
            "threshold_used": str(threshold_used),
            "annotation_only_flag": str(anno_only).lower(),
        })

    out = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    out = all_samples.merge(out, on="sample_id", how="left")

    for c, v in {
        "phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag": "false",
        "phylo_unresolved_candidate_ids": "",
        "phylo_unresolved_level": "",
        "phylo_unresolved_marker_support": "",
        "phylo_unresolved_nearest_ref": "",
        "phylo_unresolved_uncertainty_class": "",
        "phylo_unresolved_note": "",
        "threshold_used": str(threshold_used),
        "annotation_only_flag": "true",
    }.items():
        out[c] = out[c].fillna(v)

    return out

def build_final_notes_phylo_addon(
    sample_addon: pd.DataFrame,
    final_notes: pd.DataFrame,
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    norm_cols = {norm_col(c): c for c in final_notes.columns}
    if "sample_id" not in norm_cols:
        out = sample_addon.copy()
        out["note_granularity_status"] = STEP6B_E011_NOTE_NOT_SAMPLE_LEVEL
        out["phylo_note_append_only"] = "true"
        return out

    out = sample_addon.copy()
    out["note_granularity_status"] = "sample_level_ok"
    out["phylo_note_append_only"] = "true"
    return out

# =========================
# 主流程
# =========================

def run_module_b(
    result_dir: Path,
    ref_dir: Path,
    outdir: Path,
    threshold: float,
    min_samples_for_level_a: int,
) -> None:
    ensure_dir(outdir)

    annotation_conf = read_tsv(result_dir / "annotation_confidence.tsv")
    _unassigned = read_tsv(result_dir / "unassigned_features.tsv")   # 保留输入
    its1_asv = read_tsv(result_dir / "ITS1_asv_table.tsv")
    its2_asv = read_tsv(result_dir / "ITS2_asv_table.tsv")
    sample_type_call = read_tsv(result_dir / "sample_type_call.tsv")
    final_notes = read_tsv(result_dir / "final_interpretation_notes.tsv")
    its1_fasta = load_fasta(result_dir / "ITS1_rep_seqs.fasta")
    its2_fasta = load_fasta(result_dir / "ITS2_rep_seqs.fasta")

    unresolved_path = result_dir / "unresolved_cases.tsv"
    unresolved_raw = read_tsv(unresolved_path) if unresolved_path.exists() else pd.DataFrame()

    if not unresolved_raw.empty and unresolved_cases_is_feature_level(unresolved_raw):
        unresolved_feature_cases = unresolved_raw.copy()
        if "feature_id" not in unresolved_feature_cases.columns:
            feat_col = detect_col(unresolved_feature_cases, ["feature_id", "asv_id", "id"])
            unresolved_feature_cases = unresolved_feature_cases.rename(columns={feat_col: "feature_id"})
        if "unresolved_source" not in unresolved_feature_cases.columns:
            unresolved_feature_cases["unresolved_source"] = "from_unresolved_cases_primary_path"
    else:
        unresolved_feature_cases = derive_unresolved_feature_cases(annotation_conf)

我这样修，最核心的原因有三点。


第一，论文支持“真菌 ITS + UNITE + placement + uncertainty”，不支持“把所有 unresolved 都强行塞进 fungal placement”。UNITE 本身就是面向 fungal ITS 的参考体系；EPA-ng/pplacer 的价值在于把 query 放进固定参考树，并保留 evolutionary context；真菌 metabarcoding 又经常面对样本中大量 non-target DNA，因此先筛掉非真菌候选，比直接硬跑 fungal placement 更有依据。Naturalis Institutional Repository+4PMC+4OUP Academic+4


第二，98.5 更适合做“默认工作阈值”，而不是绝对物种边界”。所以我保留了 novel_identity_threshold=98.5，但同时固定输出 97 / 98.5 / 99 三档敏感性分析，并把 threshold_used 落表。这样既对齐了 UNITE/GlobalFungi 的常见 operational practice，又避免把一个社区常用阈值误写成铁律。research.chalmers.se+2Nature+2


第三，Level_A / Level_B / Level_C 我保留为“项目保守规则”，没有伪装成论文直接规定。这一点很重要。当前文献能支持的是：ITS 适合真菌 unresolved 的参考与放置、placement 比纯相似性更能保留不确定性、non-fungal 不该强行进 fungal placement、98.5 可作为 operational threshold；但文献并没有直接给出你这套 A/B/C 的项目级定义。因此我把它们写成脚本里的显式项目规则，并在注释里标明。OUP Academic+1

def asv_to_long(df: pd.DataFrame, forced_marker: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    cols_norm = {norm_col(c): c for c in df.columns}

    # 1) 已经是长表：sample_id, feature_id, reads
    if {"sample_id", "feature_id", "reads"}.issubset(cols_norm.keys()):
        out = df[[cols_norm["sample_id"], cols_norm["feature_id"], cols_norm["reads"]]].copy()
        out.columns = ["sample_id", "feature_id", "reads"]
        out["marker"] = forced_marker
        return out

    # 2) 你的真实宽表：sample_id / replicate 在前，后面全是 ASV 列
    sample_id_col = detect_col(df, ["sample_id"])
    replicate_col = detect_col(df, ["replicate"], required=False)

    reserved = {sample_id_col}
    if replicate_col:
        reserved.add(replicate_col)

    feature_cols = [c for c in df.columns if c not in reserved]

    rows = []
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        sid = str(row[sample_id_col]).strip()
        rep = str(row[replicate_col]).strip() if replicate_col else ""
        for feat in feature_cols:
            val = row[feat]
            try:
                reads = int(float(val))
            except Exception:
                reads = 0
            if reads > 0:
                rows.append({
                    "sample_id": sid,
                    "replicate": rep,
                    "feature_id": feat,
                    "reads": reads,
                    "marker": forced_marker,
                })

    out = pd.DataFrame(rows)
    if out.empty:
        return pd.DataFrame(columns=["sample_id", "replicate", "feature_id", "reads", "marker"])
    return out

def classify_prescreen(row: pd.Series) -> str:
    domain = str(row.get("domain", "")).strip().lower()
    kingdom = str(row.get("kingdom", "")).strip().lower()

    explicit = f"{domain} {kingdom}".strip()
    if explicit:
        if "fungi" in explicit:
            return "fungal_supported"
        if any(x in explicit for x in PLANT_HINTS):
            return "plant_like"
        if any(x in explicit for x in OTHER_HINTS):
            return "other"

    text = " ".join([
        str(row.get("taxon_name", "")),
        str(row.get("raw_taxonomy_text", "")),
        str(row.get("stitle", "")),
        str(row.get("reference_name", "")),
        str(row.get("annotation_scope_flag", "")),
        str(row.get("status_reason", "")),
        str(row.get("low_confidence_reason", "")),
    ]).strip().lower()

    if text:
        if any(x in text for x in FUNGAL_HINTS):
            return "fungal_supported"
        if any(x in text for x in PLANT_HINTS):
            return "plant_like"
        if any(x in text for x in OTHER_HINTS):
            return "other"

    # 关键修正：
    # 对 ITS unresolved 候选，如果没有明确 plant/other 反证，

    marker = str(row.get("marker", "")).strip().upper()
    if marker in {"ITS1", "ITS2"}:
        return "fungal_candidate_weak"

    return "insufficient_signal"

def gate_placement_by_prescreen(
    placement_summary: pd.DataFrame,
    prescreen_hits: pd.DataFrame,
) -> pd.DataFrame:
    if placement_summary.empty:
        return placement_summary

    gate = prescreen_hits[["candidate_id", "prescreen_class"]].drop_duplicates() if not prescreen_hits.empty \
        else pd.DataFrame(columns=["candidate_id", "prescreen_class"])

    out = placement_summary.merge(gate, on="candidate_id", how="left")

    allowed = {"fungal_supported", "fungal_candidate_weak"}
    mask = ~out["prescreen_class"].fillna("insufficient_signal").isin(allowed)

    out.loc[mask, "placement_status"] = "observation_only"
    out.loc[mask, "nearest_ref"] = ""
    out.loc[mask, "nearest_ref_identity"] = ""
    out.loc[mask, "placement_tool"] = ""
    out.loc[mask, "placement_note"] = "forced_observation_by_prescreen_non_fungal_supported"

    return out.drop(columns=["prescreen_class"])

def assign_level(
    prescreen_class: str,
    placement_status: str,
    nearest_ref_identity: str,
    novelty_call: str,
    sample_support_n: int,
    marker_support_class: str,
    threshold_used: float,
    min_samples_for_level_a: int = 2,
) -> Tuple[str, str]:
    # 明确非 fungal 类
    if prescreen_class in {"plant_like", "other", "insufficient_signal"}:
        return "Level_C", "non_fungal_supported_or_insufficient_signal"

    # 没有 placement
    if str(placement_status).strip().lower() != "placed":
        return "Level_C", "fungal_candidate_but_no_valid_placement"

    # 弱 fungal 候选：最多给到 Level_B
    if prescreen_class == "fungal_candidate_weak":
        return "Level_B", "weak_fungal_prior_with_valid_placement"

    # 明确 fungal_supported：允许 A/B
    if novelty_call == "candidate_novel" and (
        int(sample_support_n) >= int(min_samples_for_level_a) or marker_support_class == "BOTH"
    ):
        return "Level_A", "strongest_unresolved_evidence_not_taxonomic_claim"

    return "Level_B", "fungal_supported_with_valid_placement_but_limited_unresolved_support"

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd

RESULT_DIR = Path("/mnt/d/其他-小论文/数据库/zonode/陆宏龙/2/优化方案2/结果")
IN_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv"
OUT_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "plot_network_sample_metrics.tsv"

def norm_col(x: str) -> str:
    return (
        str(x).strip().lower()
        .replace(" ", "_")
        .replace("-", "_")
        .replace(".", "_")
        .replace("/", "_")
    )

def detect_col(df: pd.DataFrame, candidates, required=True):
    lookup = {norm_col(c): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if norm_col(cand) in lookup:
            return lookup[norm_col(cand)]
    if required:
        raise KeyError(f"Missing columns. tried={candidates}, got={list(df.columns)}")
    return None

def read_tsv(path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:
    return pd.read_csv(path, sep="\t", dtype=str, keep_default_na=False)

def truthy(x) -> bool:
    return str(x).strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "t", "yes", "y"}

df = read_tsv(IN_PATH)

sample_col = detect_col(df, ["sample_id"])

core_n_col = detect_col(df, ["network_core_support_n"], required=False)
core_any_col = detect_col(df, ["network_core_support_any"], required=False)
burden_col = detect_col(df, ["network_marker_specific_burden"])
edge_col = detect_col(df, ["edge_stability_score"], required=False)

if core_n_col:
    network_core_support_n = pd.to_numeric(df[core_n_col], errors="coerce").fillna(0)
elif core_any_col:
    network_core_support_n = df[core_any_col].map(lambda x: 1 if truthy(x) else 0)
else:
    raise KeyError("sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv 缺少 network_core_support_n 或 network_core_support_any")

if edge_col is not None:
    edge_stability_score = pd.to_numeric(df[edge_col], errors="coerce")
else:
    edge_stability_score = pd.Series([pd.NA] * len(df))

out = pd.DataFrame({
    "sample_id": df[sample_col].astype(str),
    "network_core_support_n": network_core_support_n,
    "network_marker_specific_burden": pd.to_numeric(df[burden_col], errors="coerce"),
    "edge_stability_score": edge_stability_score,
})

# 审计辅助列：若原表有就保留
for extra in [
    "network_core_support_any",
    "network_repro_support_class",
    "network_core_support_taxa",
    "dom_conflict_marker_specific_flag",
    "network_discordance_note",
]:
    c = detect_col(df, [extra], required=False)
    if c:
        out[extra] = df[c].astype(str)

out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=["sample_id"]).copy()
out.to_csv(OUT_PATH, sep="\t", index=False, encoding="utf-8")

print(f"[OK] wrote: {OUT_PATH}")
print(f"[INFO] n_samples={len(out)}")
print(f"[INFO] core_support_nonzero={(pd.to_numeric(out['network_core_support_n'], errors='coerce').fillna(0) > 0).sum()}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd

RESULT_DIR = Path("/mnt/d/其他-小论文/数据库/zonode/陆宏龙/2/优化方案2/结果")

SEC1_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS1.tsv"
SEC2_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "sample_secondary_candidates_ITS2.tsv"
CLN1_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "ITS1_clean_lineages.tsv"
CLN2_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "ITS2_clean_lineages.tsv"
TYPE_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "sample_type_call.tsv"
OUT_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "plot_state_quant_metrics.tsv"

def norm_col(x: str) -> str:
    return (
        str(x).strip().lower()
        .replace(" ", "_")
        .replace("-", "_")
        .replace(".", "_")
        .replace("/", "_")
    )

def detect_col(df: pd.DataFrame, candidates, required=True):
    lookup = {norm_col(c): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if norm_col(cand) in lookup:
            return lookup[norm_col(cand)]
    if required:
        raise KeyError(f"Missing columns. tried={candidates}, got={list(df.columns)}")
    return None

def read_tsv(path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:
    return pd.read_csv(path, sep="\t", dtype=str, keep_default_na=False)

def normalize_text(x) -> str:
    return " ".join(str(x).replace("_", " ").strip().lower().split())

def lineage_key(rank, name) -> str:
    return f"{normalize_text(rank)}||{normalize_text(name)}"

def truthy(x) -> bool:
    return str(x).strip().lower() in {
        "1", "true", "t", "yes", "y", "supported", "retain", "retained", "keep", "kept"
    }

def standardize_secondary(path: Path, marker: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = read_tsv(path)
    sample_col = detect_col(df, ["sample_id"])
    rank_col = detect_col(df, ["taxon_rank", "rank"])
    name_col = detect_col(df, ["taxon_name", "name", "taxonomy"])
    retained_col = detect_col(df, ["retained_flag", "retained", "is_retained"], required=False)
    support_col = detect_col(df, ["replicate_support_status", "support_status"], required=False)

    work = pd.DataFrame({
        "sample_id": df[sample_col].astype(str),
        "marker": marker,
        "taxon_rank": df[rank_col].astype(str),
        "taxon_name": df[name_col].astype(str),
    })

    if retained_col:
        keep_retained = df[retained_col].map(truthy)
    else:
        keep_retained = pd.Series([True] * len(df))

    if support_col:
        support_ok = df[support_col].astype(str).str.strip().str.lower().isin({"supported", "true", "1", "yes"})
    else:
        support_ok = pd.Series([True] * len(df))

    work = work[keep_retained & support_ok].copy()
    work["lineage_key"] = [
        lineage_key(r, n) for r, n in zip(work["taxon_rank"], work["taxon_name"])
    ]
    return work.drop_duplicates(subset=["sample_id", "marker", "lineage_key"])

def standardize_clean(path: Path, marker: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = read_tsv(path)
    sample_col = detect_col(df, ["sample_id"])
    rank_col = detect_col(df, ["taxon_rank", "rank"])
    name_col = detect_col(df, ["taxon_name", "name", "taxonomy"])
    reads_col = detect_col(df, ["clean_reads", "reads", "retained_reads"])

    work = pd.DataFrame({
        "sample_id": df[sample_col].astype(str),
        "marker": marker,
        "taxon_rank": df[rank_col].astype(str),
        "taxon_name": df[name_col].astype(str),
        "clean_reads": pd.to_numeric(df[reads_col], errors="coerce").fillna(0),
    })

    work["lineage_key"] = [
        lineage_key(r, n) for r, n in zip(work["taxon_rank"], work["taxon_name"])
    ]
    work = work[work["clean_reads"] > 0].copy()
    return work

# 读取
sec1 = standardize_secondary(SEC1_PATH, "ITS1")
sec2 = standardize_secondary(SEC2_PATH, "ITS2")
sec = pd.concat([sec1, sec2], ignore_index=True)

cln1 = standardize_clean(CLN1_PATH, "ITS1")
cln2 = standardize_clean(CLN2_PATH, "ITS2")
cln = pd.concat([cln1, cln2], ignore_index=True)

sample_type = read_tsv(TYPE_PATH)
type_sample_col = detect_col(sample_type, ["sample_id"])
final_type_col = detect_col(sample_type, ["final_type"], required=False)

sample_base = sample_type[[type_sample_col]].drop_duplicates().rename(columns={type_sample_col: "sample_id"})
if final_type_col:
    sample_base["final_type"] = sample_type[final_type_col].astype(str)

# 可用 marker
available_markers = (
    cln.groupby(["sample_id", "marker"], as_index=False)["clean_reads"]
    .sum()
    .rename(columns={"clean_reads": "total_clean_reads"})
)
available_markers = available_markers[available_markers["total_clean_reads"] > 0].copy()

marker_count = (
    available_markers.groupby("sample_id", as_index=False)["marker"]
    .nunique()
    .rename(columns={"marker": "available_marker_n"})
)
marker_list = (
    available_markers.groupby("sample_id", as_index=False)["marker"]
    .agg(lambda x: "|".join(sorted(set(map(str, x)))))
    .rename(columns={"marker": "markers_available"})
)

# marker 级 supported secondary 计数
supported_counts = (
    sec.groupby(["sample_id", "marker"], as_index=False)["lineage_key"]
    .nunique()
    .rename(columns={"lineage_key": "n_supported_secondary"})
)

# 所有 sample × 可用 marker 组合，缺失支持数补 0
sample_marker = available_markers[["sample_id", "marker"]].drop_duplicates().copy()
sample_marker = sample_marker.merge(supported_counts, on=["sample_id", "marker"], how="left")
sample_marker["n_supported_secondary"] = sample_marker["n_supported_secondary"].fillna(0)

supported_lineage_n = (
    sample_marker.groupby("sample_id", as_index=False)["n_supported_secondary"]
    .mean()
    .rename(columns={"n_supported_secondary": "supported_lineage_n"})
)

# dominant_fraction：marker 内最大相对丰度，再对 sample 平均
marker_total = (
    cln.groupby(["sample_id", "marker"], as_index=False)["clean_reads"]
    .sum()
    .rename(columns={"clean_reads": "marker_total_reads"})
)
cln_dom = cln.merge(marker_total, on=["sample_id", "marker"], how="left")
cln_dom["within_marker_rel_abund"] = cln_dom["clean_reads"] / cln_dom["marker_total_reads"]
marker_dom = (
    cln_dom.groupby(["sample_id", "marker"], as_index=False)["within_marker_rel_abund"]
    .max()
    .rename(columns={"within_marker_rel_abund": "dominant_fraction_marker"})
)
dominant_fraction = (
    marker_dom.groupby("sample_id", as_index=False)["dominant_fraction_marker"]
    .mean()
    .rename(columns={"dominant_fraction_marker": "dominant_fraction"})
)

# secondary_fraction：supported secondary 在 clean_lineages 中占比，再对 sample 平均
sec_keys = sec[["sample_id", "marker", "lineage_key"]].drop_duplicates().copy()
cln_sec = cln.merge(sec_keys.assign(is_supported_secondary=True),
                    on=["sample_id", "marker", "lineage_key"],
                    how="left")
cln_sec["is_supported_secondary"] = cln_sec["is_supported_secondary"].fillna(False)

marker_sec = (
    cln_sec.groupby(["sample_id", "marker"], as_index=False)
    .apply(lambda g: pd.Series({
        "secondary_reads": g.loc[g["is_supported_secondary"] == True, "clean_reads"].sum(),
        "total_reads": g["clean_reads"].sum(),
    }), include_groups=False)
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)
marker_sec["secondary_fraction_marker"] = marker_sec["secondary_reads"] / marker_sec["total_reads"]
secondary_fraction = (
    marker_sec.groupby("sample_id", as_index=False)["secondary_fraction_marker"]
    .mean()
    .rename(columns={"secondary_fraction_marker": "secondary_fraction"})
)

# shared_supported_secondary_n：ITS1 / ITS2 交集数
sec_sets = (
    sec.groupby(["sample_id", "marker"])["lineage_key"]
    .apply(lambda x: set(map(str, x)))
    .to_dict()
)

samples = sorted(set(sample_base["sample_id"].astype(str)))
shared_rows = []
for sid in samples:
    s1 = sec_sets.get((sid, "ITS1"), set())
    s2 = sec_sets.get((sid, "ITS2"), set())
    shared_rows.append({
        "sample_id": sid,
        "shared_supported_secondary_n": len(s1.intersection(s2))
    })
shared_supported_secondary_n = pd.DataFrame(shared_rows)

# single_marker_only
single_marker_only = marker_count.copy()
single_marker_only["single_marker_only"] = single_marker_only["available_marker_n"].apply(
    lambda x: "TRUE" if int(x) == 1 else "FALSE"
)

# 合并
out = sample_base.copy()
for part in [
    marker_count,
    marker_list,
    supported_lineage_n,
    secondary_fraction,
    shared_supported_secondary_n,
    dominant_fraction,
    single_marker_only[["sample_id", "single_marker_only"]],
]:
    out = out.merge(part, on="sample_id", how="left")

# 对没有 clean_lineages 的样本保留空值；对 shared/intersection 缺失补 0
for c in ["shared_supported_secondary_n"]:
    out[c] = pd.to_numeric(out[c], errors="coerce").fillna(0).astype(int)

# 对有 available markers 但 supported_lineage_n 缺失的样本补 0
mask_has_marker = out["available_marker_n"].fillna(0).astype(float) > 0
out.loc[mask_has_marker & out["supported_lineage_n"].isna(), "supported_lineage_n"] = 0
out.loc[mask_has_marker & out["secondary_fraction"].isna(), "secondary_fraction"] = 0

# 排序与写出
out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=["sample_id"]).copy()
out.to_csv(OUT_PATH, sep="\t", index=False, encoding="utf-8")

print(f"[OK] wrote: {OUT_PATH}")
print(f"[INFO] n_samples={len(out)}")
print(f"[INFO] single_marker_only_n={(out['single_marker_only'] == 'TRUE').sum() if 'single_marker_only' in out.columns else 0}")
print(f"[INFO] supported_lineage_n_non_na={out['supported_lineage_n'].notna().sum() if 'supported_lineage_n' in out.columns else 0}")
print(f"[INFO] secondary_fraction_non_na={out['secondary_fraction'].notna().sum() if 'secondary_fraction' in out.columns else 0}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd

RESULT_DIR = Path("/mnt/d/其他-小论文/数据库/zonode/陆宏龙/2/优化方案2/结果")
TYPE_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "sample_type_call.tsv"
ADDON_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv"
EDGE_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "edge_stability_summary.tsv"
OUT_PATH = RESULT_DIR / "plot_network_sample_metrics.tsv"

def norm_col(x: str) -> str:
    return (
        str(x).strip().lower()
        .replace(" ", "_")
        .replace("-", "_")
        .replace(".", "_")
        .replace("/", "_")
    )

def detect_col(df: pd.DataFrame, candidates, required=True):
    lookup = {norm_col(c): c for c in df.columns}
    for cand in candidates:
        if norm_col(cand) in lookup:
            return lookup[norm_col(cand)]
    if required:
        raise KeyError(f"Missing columns. tried={candidates}, got={list(df.columns)}")
    return None

def read_tsv(path: Path) -> pd.DataFrame:
    return pd.read_csv(path, sep="\t", dtype=str, keep_default_na=False)

def truthy(x) -> bool:
    return str(x).strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "t", "yes", "y"}

def count_semicolon_items(x) -> int:
    vals = []
    seen = set()
    for v in str(x).split(";"):
        v = v.strip()
        if v and v not in seen:
            seen.add(v)
            vals.append(v)
    return len(vals)

def to_num(s: pd.Series) -> pd.Series:
    return pd.to_numeric(s, errors="coerce")

# -------------------------
# 1) 读 sample_type_call 作为全样本底表
# -------------------------
st = read_tsv(TYPE_PATH)
sid_col = detect_col(st, ["sample_id"])
final_type_col = detect_col(st, ["final_type"], required=False)

base = st[[sid_col]].drop_duplicates().rename(columns={sid_col: "sample_id"})
if final_type_col:
    base["final_type"] = st[final_type_col].astype(str)

# -------------------------
# 2) 读 network addon
# -------------------------
net = read_tsv(ADDON_PATH)
net_sid_col = detect_col(net, ["sample_id"])

# 先去重，避免重复 sample_id
net = net.drop_duplicates(subset=[net_sid_col]).copy()

# 合并到底表，确保是 50 个样本而不是 49 个
df = base.merge(
    net.rename(columns={net_sid_col: "sample_id"}),
    on="sample_id",
    how="left"
)

# -------------------------
# 3) network_core_support_n
# 优先级：
#   a) network_core_support_n
#   b) 计数 network_core_support_taxa
#   c) network_core_support_any -> 1/0
# -------------------------
core_n_col = detect_col(df, ["network_core_support_n"], required=False)
core_taxa_col = detect_col(df, ["network_core_support_taxa"], required=False)
core_any_col = detect_col(df, ["network_core_support_any"], required=False)

if core_n_col:
    network_core_support_n = to_num(df[core_n_col]).fillna(0)
    core_n_source = "network_core_support_n"
elif core_taxa_col:
    network_core_support_n = df[core_taxa_col].map(count_semicolon_items)
    core_n_source = "network_core_support_taxa_count"
elif core_any_col:
    network_core_support_n = df[core_any_col].map(lambda x: 1 if truthy(x) else 0)
    core_n_source = "network_core_support_any_to_01"
else:
    network_core_support_n = pd.Series([0] * len(df))
    core_n_source = "fallback_zero"

# network_core_support_any：若原表有就保留；否则由 core_n 推断
if core_any_col:
    network_core_support_any = df[core_any_col].map(lambda x: "TRUE" if truthy(x) else "FALSE")
else:
    network_core_support_any = network_core_support_n.map(lambda x: "TRUE" if float(x) > 0 else "FALSE")

# -------------------------
# 4) network_marker_specific_burden
# 优先级：
#   a) network_marker_specific_burden
#   b) dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n / induced_subgraph_edge_n
# -------------------------
burden_col = detect_col(df, ["network_marker_specific_burden"], required=False)
dom_mse_col = detect_col(df, ["dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n"], required=False)
induced_col = detect_col(df, ["induced_subgraph_edge_n"], required=False)

if burden_col:
    network_marker_specific_burden = to_num(df[burden_col])
    burden_source = "network_marker_specific_burden"
elif dom_mse_col and induced_col:
    num = to_num(df[dom_mse_col])
    den = to_num(df[induced_col])
    network_marker_specific_burden = num / den
    network_marker_specific_burden = network_marker_specific_burden.where(den > 0, pd.NA)
    burden_source = "dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n_over_induced_subgraph_edge_n"
else:
    network_marker_specific_burden = pd.Series([pd.NA] * len(df))
    burden_source = "missing"

# -------------------------
# 5) edge_stability_score
# 优先级：
#   a) edge_stability_score
#   b) dom_taxa_min_edge_stability / network_core_min_edge_stability
#   c) dom_taxa_mean_edge_stability / network_core_mean_edge_stability
#   d) 无法样本级恢复 -> NA
# -------------------------
edge_candidates = [
    "edge_stability_score",
    "dom_taxa_min_edge_stability",
    "network_core_min_edge_stability",
    "min_edge_stability_score",
    "dom_taxa_mean_edge_stability",
    "network_core_mean_edge_stability",
    "mean_edge_stability_score",
]
edge_col = detect_col(df, edge_candidates, required=False)

if edge_col:
    edge_stability_score = to_num(df[edge_col])
    edge_source = edge_col
else:
    edge_stability_score = pd.Series([pd.NA] * len(df))
    edge_source = "missing_sample_level_edge_stability"

# 尝试读取 edge_stability_summary.tsv 的全局阈值，仅作审计辅助，不伪造 sample-level 值
global_stability_threshold_used = ""
if EDGE_PATH.exists():
    try:
        edge_summary = read_tsv(EDGE_PATH)
        th_col = detect_col(edge_summary, ["stability_threshold_used"], required=False)
        if th_col and not edge_summary.empty:
            vals = [str(v).strip() for v in edge_summary[th_col].tolist() if str(v).strip()]
            if vals:
                global_stability_threshold_used = vals[0]
    except Exception:
        global_stability_threshold_used = ""

# -------------------------
# 6) 输出 plotting table
# -------------------------
out = pd.DataFrame({
    "sample_id": df["sample_id"].astype(str),
    "network_core_support_n": network_core_support_n,
    "network_marker_specific_burden": network_marker_specific_burden,
    "edge_stability_score": edge_stability_score,
    "network_core_support_any": network_core_support_any,
})

# 保留 final_type 方便审计
if "final_type" in df.columns:
    out["final_type"] = df["final_type"].astype(str)

# 审计辅助列：若原表存在就保留
for extra in [
    "network_core_support_taxa",
    "network_repro_support_class",
    "dom_conflict_marker_specific_flag",
    "network_discordance_note",
    "dom_taxa_marker_specific_edge_n",
    "induced_subgraph_edge_n",
]:
    c = detect_col(df, [extra], required=False)
    if c:
        out[extra] = df[c].astype(str)

# 额外记录本次恢复来源
out["network_core_support_n_source"] = core_n_source
out["network_marker_specific_burden_source"] = burden_source
out["edge_stability_score_source"] = edge_source
out["global_stability_threshold_used"] = global_stability_threshold_used

# 确保 sample_id 唯一
out = out.drop_duplicates(subset=["sample_id"]).copy()

# 写出
out.to_csv(OUT_PATH, sep="\t", index=False, encoding="utf-8")

print(f"[OK] wrote: {OUT_PATH}")
print(f"[INFO] n_samples={len(out)}")
print(f"[INFO] core_support_nonzero={(pd.to_numeric(out['network_core_support_n'], errors='coerce').fillna(0) > 0).sum()}")
print(f"[INFO] burden_non_na={out['network_marker_specific_burden'].notna().sum()}")
print(f"[INFO] edge_stability_non_na={out['edge_stability_score'].notna().sum()}")
print(f"[INFO] core_n_source={core_n_source}")
print(f"[INFO] burden_source={burden_source}")
print(f"[INFO] edge_source={edge_source}")
print(f"[INFO] global_stability_threshold_used={global_stability_threshold_used}")

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressWarnings(options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE))

required_pkgs <- c(
  "readr", "dplyr", "tidyr", "stringr", "forcats",
  "ggplot2", "patchwork", "ggalluvial", "scales"
)

missing_pkgs <- required_pkgs[!vapply(required_pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing_pkgs) > 0) {
  stop(sprintf("Missing packages: %s", paste(missing_pkgs, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggalluvial)
library(scales)

# =========================
# Paths
# =========================
result_dir <- "D:/其他-小论文/数据库/zonode/陆宏龙/2/优化方案2/结果"
chart_dir  <- "D:/其他-小论文/数据库/zonode/陆宏龙/2/优化方案2/图表"

dir.create(chart_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =========================
# File paths
# =========================
f_st    <- file.path(result_dir, "sample_type_call.tsv")
f_cms   <- file.path(result_dir, "cross_marker_support_summary.tsv")
f_net   <- file.path(result_dir, "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv")
f_phy   <- file.path(result_dir, "sample_type_call_phylo_addon.tsv")
f_state <- file.path(result_dir, "plot_state_quant_metrics.tsv")
f_netm  <- file.path(result_dir, "plot_network_sample_metrics.tsv")
f_phym  <- file.path(result_dir, "plot_phylo_sample_metrics.tsv")

# =========================
# Helpers
# =========================
read_tsv_safe <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
}

to_bool <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  x %in% c("1", "true", "t", "yes", "y", "supported")
}

collapse_level <- function(x) {
  vals <- unique(trimws(unlist(strsplit(as.character(x), ";", fixed = TRUE))))
  vals <- vals[vals != ""]
  if ("Level_A" %in% vals) return("Level_A")
  if ("Level_B" %in% vals) return("Level_B")
  if ("Level_C" %in% vals) return("Level_C")
  return(NA_character_)
}

clean_reason_code <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[x == ""] <- "other_or_fallback"
  x
}

safe_num <- function(x) {
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

save_pdf_plot <- function(plot_obj, out_path, width = 10, height = 7) {
  grDevices::cairo_pdf(filename = out_path, width = width, height = height, onefile = FALSE)
  print(plot_obj)
  dev.off()
}

# =========================
# Colors
# =========================
final_type_colors <- c(
  "Dominant single-lineage" = "#4C78A8",
  "Stable multi-lineage"    = "#F58518",
  "Unresolved"              = "#9D9D9D"
)

bool_colors <- c(
  "TRUE"  = "#2E7D32",
  "FALSE" = "#D9D9D9"
)

conflict_bool_colors <- c(
  "TRUE"  = "#C62828",
  "FALSE" = "#D9D9D9"
)

phylo_level_colors <- c(
  "Level_A" = "#2C7FB8",
  "Level_B" = "#7FCDBB",
  "Level_C" = "#C7E9B4",
  "None"    = "#D9D9D9"
)

# =========================
# Read tables
# =========================
st    <- read_tsv_safe(f_st)
cms   <- read_tsv_safe(f_cms)
net   <- read_tsv_safe(f_net)
phy   <- read_tsv_safe(f_phy)
state <- read_tsv_safe(f_state)
netm  <- read_tsv_safe(f_netm)
phym  <- read_tsv_safe(f_phym)

# =========================
# Standardize / join
# =========================
st2 <- st %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    final_type = as.character(final_type),
    reason_code = clean_reason_code(reason_code)
  )

final_type_map <- c(
  "主导单谱系型" = "Dominant single-lineage",
  "稳定多谱系型" = "Stable multi-lineage",
  "未定型"       = "Unresolved"
)

st2 <- st2 %>%
  mutate(
    final_type_en = recode(final_type, !!!final_type_map),
    final_type_en = factor(
      final_type_en,
      levels = c("Dominant single-lineage", "Stable multi-lineage", "Unresolved")
    )
  )

cms2 <- cms %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    dom_match = to_bool(dom_match),
    dom_conflict = to_bool(dom_conflict),
    cross_secondary_supported = to_bool(cross_secondary_supported)
  )

net2 <- net %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    network_core_support_any = if ("network_core_support_any" %in% names(net)) to_bool(network_core_support_any) else FALSE
  )

phy2 <- phy %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag = to_bool(phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag),
    phylo_unresolved_level_raw = as.character(phylo_unresolved_level)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    phylo_unresolved_level = vapply(phylo_unresolved_level_raw, collapse_level, character(1)),
    phylo_unresolved_level = ifelse(is.na(phylo_unresolved_level), "None", phylo_unresolved_level)
  )

state2 <- state %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    supported_lineage_n = safe_num(supported_lineage_n)
  )

netm2 <- netm %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    network_core_support_n = safe_num(network_core_support_n),
    network_marker_specific_burden = safe_num(network_marker_specific_burden),
    edge_stability_score = safe_num(edge_stability_score)
  )

phym2 <- phym %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    unresolved_candidate_n = safe_num(unresolved_candidate_n),
    placed_candidate_support_flag = if ("placed_candidate_support_flag" %in% names(phym)) as.character(placed_candidate_support_flag) else NA_character_
  )

master <- st2 %>%
  left_join(cms2,  by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(net2,  by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(phy2,  by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(state2, by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(netm2, by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(phym2, by = "sample_id") %>%
  mutate(
    dom_match = replace_na(dom_match, FALSE),
    dom_conflict = replace_na(dom_conflict, FALSE),
    cross_secondary_supported = replace_na(cross_secondary_supported, FALSE),
    network_core_support_any = replace_na(network_core_support_any, FALSE),
    phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag = replace_na(phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag, FALSE),
    phylo_unresolved_level = replace_na(phylo_unresolved_level, "None"),
    supported_lineage_n = replace_na(supported_lineage_n, 0),
    network_core_support_n = replace_na(network_core_support_n, 0),
    unresolved_candidate_n = replace_na(unresolved_candidate_n, 0)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    sample_order_rank = row_number()
  )

# Sample ordering for Fig 7A
master <- master %>%
  arrange(
    final_type_en,
    desc(supported_lineage_n),
    desc(network_core_support_n),
    desc(unresolved_candidate_n),
    sample_id
  ) %>%
  mutate(sample_id_factor = factor(sample_id, levels = rev(sample_id)))

# =========================
# Figure 7A: Evidence atlas
# =========================
reason_levels <- master %>%
  distinct(reason_code) %>%
  arrange(reason_code) %>%
  pull(reason_code)

reason_palette <- setNames(
  scales::hue_pal()(length(reason_levels)),
  reason_levels
)

fig7a_df <- master %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = sample_id,
    sample_id_factor = sample_id_factor,
    final_type = as.character(final_type_en),
    reason_code = reason_code,
    dom_match = ifelse(dom_match, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    dom_conflict = ifelse(dom_conflict, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    cross_secondary_supported = ifelse(cross_secondary_supported, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    network_core_support_any = ifelse(network_core_support_any, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag = ifelse(phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    phylo_unresolved_level = phylo_unresolved_level
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      final_type,
      reason_code,
      dom_match,
      dom_conflict,
      cross_secondary_supported,
      network_core_support_any,
      phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag,
      phylo_unresolved_level
    ),
    names_to = "evidence_field",
    values_to = "evidence_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    evidence_field = factor(
      evidence_field,
      levels = c(
        "final_type",
        "reason_code",
        "dom_match",
        "dom_conflict",
        "cross_secondary_supported",
        "network_core_support_any",
        "phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag",
        "phylo_unresolved_level"
      ),
      labels = c(
        "Final type",
        "Reason code",
        "Dominant match",
        "Dominant conflict",
        "Cross-marker secondary support",
        "Network core support",
        "Phylo annotation flag",
        "Phylo level"
      )
    )
  )

fig7a_fill_values <- c(
  final_type_colors,
  bool_colors,
  conflict_bool_colors,
  phylo_level_colors,
  reason_palette
)

fig7a_plot <- ggplot(fig7a_df, aes(x = evidence_field, y = sample_id_factor, fill = evidence_value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fig7a_fill_values, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 7A. Evidence atlas",
    x = "Evidence field",
    y = "Samples"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

readr::write_tsv(fig7a_df, file.path(chart_dir, "Figure7A_EvidenceAtlas_plotdata.tsv"))
save_pdf_plot(fig7a_plot, file.path(chart_dir, "Figure7A_EvidenceAtlas.pdf"), width = 10.5, height = 11)

# =========================
# Figure 7B: Integrated burden mini-panels
# =========================
fig7b_df <- master %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = sample_id,
    final_type = final_type_en,
    supported_lineage_n = supported_lineage_n,
    network_core_support_n = network_core_support_n,
    edge_stability_score = edge_stability_score,
    unresolved_candidate_n = unresolved_candidate_n
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      supported_lineage_n,
      network_core_support_n,
      edge_stability_score,
      unresolved_candidate_n
    ),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    metric = factor(
      metric,
      levels = c(
        "supported_lineage_n",
        "network_core_support_n",
        "edge_stability_score",
        "unresolved_candidate_n"
      ),
      labels = c(
        "Supported lineages",
        "Network core support",
        "Edge stability",
        "Unresolved candidates"
      )
    )
  )

edge_line_df <- tibble(
  metric = factor("Edge stability", levels = levels(fig7b_df$metric)),
  yint = 0.70
)

fig7b_plot <- ggplot(fig7b_df, aes(x = final_type, y = value, fill = final_type)) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.65, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.85, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.12, size = 1.1, alpha = 0.65, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_hline(
    data = edge_line_df,
    aes(yintercept = yint),
    linetype = "dashed",

  ) +

  scale_fill_manual(values = final_type_colors, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "Figure 7B. Integrated burden panels",
    x = "Final type",
    y = "Value"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1)
  )

readr::write_tsv(fig7b_df, file.path(chart_dir, "Figure7B_BurdenPanels_plotdata.tsv"))
save_pdf_plot(fig7b_plot, file.path(chart_dir, "Figure7B_BurdenPanels.pdf"), width = 11.5, height = 4.6)

# =========================
# Figure 7C: Evidence flow diagram
# =========================
fig7c_df <- master %>%
  mutate(
    dominant_evidence_class = case_when(
      dom_conflict ~ "Dominant conflict",
      dom_match ~ "Dominant match",
      TRUE ~ "No clear dominant"
    ),
    secondary_support_class = case_when(
      cross_secondary_supported ~ "Cross-marker secondary support",
      TRUE ~ "Secondary not cross-supported"
    ),
    network_any = network_core_support_any | !is.na(network_marker_specific_burden) | !is.na(edge_stability_score),
    phylo_any = phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag | (placed_candidate_support_flag %in% c("TRUE", "true", "True")),
    addon_evidence_class = case_when(
      network_any & phylo_any ~ "Both",
      network_any & !phylo_any ~ "Network only",
      !network_any & phylo_any ~ "Phylo only",
      TRUE ~ "None"
    ),
    final_type = as.character(final_type_en)
  ) %>%
  count(
    dominant_evidence_class,
    secondary_support_class,
    addon_evidence_class,
    final_type,
    name = "flow_n"
  )

N_total <- sum(fig7c_df$flow_n)
flow_threshold <- max(3, ceiling(0.01 * N_total))

fig7c_df <- fig7c_df %>%
  mutate(
    dominant_evidence_class = ifelse(flow_n < flow_threshold, "Other path", dominant_evidence_class),
    secondary_support_class = ifelse(flow_n < flow_threshold, "Other path", secondary_support_class),
    addon_evidence_class = ifelse(flow_n < flow_threshold, "Other path", addon_evidence_class)
  ) %>%
  group_by(
    dominant_evidence_class,
    secondary_support_class,
    addon_evidence_class,

Responding to console warnings and suggesting fixes


The user likely wants help addressing the warnings from the Figure7 plotting code. The ggalluvial warning can be fixed by using discern = TRUE or ensuring unique axis labels per axis. The min/max Inf warnings likely come from facet issues in Figure7B. I'll propose code changes to resolve these.


Clarifying facet issue and suggesting concise code fixes


It seems the issue is from using free_y in Figure7B and having an all-NA facet due to missing edge_stability_score values. To fix this, I suggest either removing the all-NA facets or using a placeholder. I'll provide a brief explanation and a couple of quick code patches for Figure7C and Figure7B, including handling repeated strata warnings.

#!/usr/bin/env Rscript

suppressWarnings(options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE))

required_pkgs <- c(
  "readr", "dplyr", "tidyr", "stringr", "forcats",
  "ggplot2", "patchwork", "ggalluvial", "scales"
)

missing_pkgs <- required_pkgs[!vapply(required_pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(missing_pkgs) > 0) {
  stop(sprintf("Missing packages: %s", paste(missing_pkgs, collapse = ", ")), call. = FALSE)
}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(forcats)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(ggalluvial)
library(scales)

# =========================
# Paths
# =========================
result_dir <- "D:/其他-小论文/数据库/zonode/陆宏龙/2/优化方案2/结果"
chart_dir  <- "D:/其他-小论文/数据库/zonode/陆宏龙/2/优化方案2/图表"

dir.create(chart_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# =========================
# File paths
# =========================
f_st    <- file.path(result_dir, "sample_type_call.tsv")
f_cms   <- file.path(result_dir, "cross_marker_support_summary.tsv")
f_net   <- file.path(result_dir, "sample_type_call_network_addon.tsv")
f_phy   <- file.path(result_dir, "sample_type_call_phylo_addon.tsv")
f_state <- file.path(result_dir, "plot_state_quant_metrics.tsv")
f_netm  <- file.path(result_dir, "plot_network_sample_metrics.tsv")
f_phym  <- file.path(result_dir, "plot_phylo_sample_metrics.tsv")

# =========================
# Helpers
# =========================
read_tsv_safe <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, progress = FALSE)
}

to_bool <- function(x) {
  x <- tolower(trimws(as.character(x)))
  x %in% c("1", "true", "t", "yes", "y", "supported")
}

collapse_level <- function(x) {
  vals <- unique(trimws(unlist(strsplit(as.character(x), ";", fixed = TRUE))))
  vals <- vals[vals != ""]
  if ("Level_A" %in% vals) return("Level_A")
  if ("Level_B" %in% vals) return("Level_B")
  if ("Level_C" %in% vals) return("Level_C")
  return(NA_character_)
}

clean_reason_code <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[x == ""] <- "other_or_fallback"
  x
}

safe_num <- function(x) {
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
}

save_pdf_plot <- function(plot_obj, out_path, width = 10, height = 7) {
  grDevices::cairo_pdf(filename = out_path, width = width, height = height, onefile = FALSE)
  print(plot_obj)
  dev.off()
}

# =========================
# Colors
# =========================
final_type_colors <- c(
  "Dominant single-lineage" = "#4C78A8",
  "Stable multi-lineage"    = "#F58518",
  "Unresolved"              = "#9D9D9D"
)

phylo_level_colors <- c(
  "Level_A" = "#2C7FB8",
  "Level_B" = "#7FCDBB",
  "Level_C" = "#C7E9B4",
  "None"    = "#D9D9D9"
)

# =========================
# Read tables
# =========================
st    <- read_tsv_safe(f_st)
cms   <- read_tsv_safe(f_cms)
net   <- read_tsv_safe(f_net)
phy   <- read_tsv_safe(f_phy)
state <- read_tsv_safe(f_state)
netm  <- read_tsv_safe(f_netm)
phym  <- read_tsv_safe(f_phym)

# =========================
# Standardize / join
# =========================
st2 <- st %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    final_type = as.character(final_type),
    reason_code = clean_reason_code(reason_code)
  )

final_type_map <- c(
  "主导单谱系型" = "Dominant single-lineage",
  "稳定多谱系型" = "Stable multi-lineage",
  "未定型"       = "Unresolved"
)

st2 <- st2 %>%
  mutate(
    final_type_en = recode(final_type, !!!final_type_map),
    final_type_en = factor(
      final_type_en,
      levels = c("Dominant single-lineage", "Stable multi-lineage", "Unresolved")
    )
  )

cms2 <- cms %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    dom_match = to_bool(dom_match),
    dom_conflict = to_bool(dom_conflict),
    cross_secondary_supported = to_bool(cross_secondary_supported)
  )

net2 <- net %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    network_core_support_any = if ("network_core_support_any" %in% names(net)) to_bool(network_core_support_any) else FALSE
  )

phy2 <- phy %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag = to_bool(phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag),
    phylo_unresolved_level_raw = as.character(phylo_unresolved_level)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    phylo_unresolved_level = vapply(phylo_unresolved_level_raw, collapse_level, character(1)),
    phylo_unresolved_level = ifelse(is.na(phylo_unresolved_level), "None", phylo_unresolved_level)
  )

state2 <- state %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    supported_lineage_n = safe_num(supported_lineage_n)
  )

netm2 <- netm %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    network_core_support_n = safe_num(network_core_support_n),
    network_marker_specific_burden = safe_num(network_marker_specific_burden),
    edge_stability_score = safe_num(edge_stability_score)
  )

phym2 <- phym %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = as.character(sample_id),
    unresolved_candidate_n = safe_num(unresolved_candidate_n),
    placed_candidate_support_flag = if ("placed_candidate_support_flag" %in% names(phym)) as.character(placed_candidate_support_flag) else NA_character_
  )

master <- st2 %>%
  left_join(cms2,  by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(net2,  by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(phy2,  by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(state2, by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(netm2, by = "sample_id") %>%
  left_join(phym2, by = "sample_id") %>%
  mutate(
    dom_match = replace_na(dom_match, FALSE),
    dom_conflict = replace_na(dom_conflict, FALSE),
    cross_secondary_supported = replace_na(cross_secondary_supported, FALSE),
    network_core_support_any = replace_na(network_core_support_any, FALSE),
    phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag = replace_na(phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag, FALSE),
    phylo_unresolved_level = replace_na(phylo_unresolved_level, "None"),
    supported_lineage_n = replace_na(supported_lineage_n, 0),
    network_core_support_n = replace_na(network_core_support_n, 0),
    unresolved_candidate_n = replace_na(unresolved_candidate_n, 0)
  ) %>%
  arrange(
    final_type_en,
    desc(supported_lineage_n),
    desc(network_core_support_n),
    desc(unresolved_candidate_n),
    sample_id
  ) %>%
  mutate(sample_id_factor = factor(sample_id, levels = rev(sample_id)))

# =========================
# Figure 7A: Evidence atlas
# =========================
reason_levels <- master %>%
  distinct(reason_code) %>%
  arrange(reason_code) %>%
  pull(reason_code)

reason_palette <- setNames(
  scales::hue_pal()(length(reason_levels)),
  reason_levels
)

fig7a_df <- master %>%
  transmute(
    sample_id = sample_id,
    sample_id_factor = sample_id_factor,
    final_type = as.character(final_type_en),
    reason_code = reason_code,
    dom_match = ifelse(dom_match, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    dom_conflict = ifelse(dom_conflict, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    cross_secondary_supported = ifelse(cross_secondary_supported, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    network_core_support_any = ifelse(network_core_support_any, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag = ifelse(phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag, "TRUE", "FALSE"),
    phylo_unresolved_level = phylo_unresolved_level
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(
      final_type,
      reason_code,
      dom_match,
      dom_conflict,
      cross_secondary_supported,
      network_core_support_any,
      phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag,
      phylo_unresolved_level
    ),
    names_to = "evidence_field",
    values_to = "evidence_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    evidence_field = factor(
      evidence_field,
      levels = c(
        "final_type",
        "reason_code",
        "dom_match",
        "dom_conflict",
        "cross_secondary_supported",
        "network_core_support_any",
        "phylo_unresolved_annotation_flag",
        "phylo_unresolved_level"
      ),
      labels = c(
        "Final type",
        "Reason code",
        "Dominant match",
        "Dominant conflict",
        "Cross-marker secondary support",
        "Network core support",
        "Phylo annotation flag",
        "Phylo level"
      )
    ),
    fill_key = case_when(
      evidence_field == "Final type" ~ paste0("final_type::", evidence_value),
      evidence_field == "Reason code" ~ paste0("reason_code::", evidence_value),

        work = df[[group_col, col]].copy()
        work[col] = to_num(work[col])
        out = work.groupby(group_col)[col].agg(
